comparison.description: BetterFleet is built to find your game server quickly — and reliably. In our benchmark it detects the server in about 5 seconds, roughly 3 to 4 times faster than Fleet Creator. It also keeps working where Fleet Creator no longer does: recent Sea of Thieves updates and their new relay servers (SDR) broke its detection method, which now often reports a wrong or "corrupted" server. Our new traffic-based analysis was built around those servers, so it keeps pointing you to the right one. The chart compares detection times side by side: the lower the bar, the better.
comparison.subtitle: Faster server detection — less time in menus, more time at sea.
comparison.title: Comparison with Fleet Creator

descriptions.globe: A clean interface inspired by the style of Sea of Thieves — it feels like a natural extension of the game.
descriptions.hourglass: A shared countdown syncs every player's "Set sail" click, so your crews launch at the same moment and land together more often.
descriptions.key: Open source and auditable: the full code is public, and an active team keeps it updated and secure.
descriptions.title: The essentials

discord.content: Most of BetterFleet's day-to-day life happens on our Discord. Players swap tips, report bugs, and suggest ideas that regularly make it into the app. Whether you need a hand or just want to sail with other crews, that's the place to be.
discord.title: The community lives on Discord

github.content: BetterFleet is fully open source. Anyone can read the code, report a bug, or open a pull request — and player feedback genuinely shapes where the project heads. If you'd like to help build it, the repository is open to you.
github.title: Open source, open to contributions

translation.content: BetterFleet is translated by its community through Crowdin, so players around the world can use it in their own language. If yours is missing or a translation could be better, you're very welcome to lend a hand.
translation.title: Available in your language

pc.content: You're on your phone — keep the link handy and install the app later on your Windows PC.
pc.title: BetterFleet installs on PC

faq.description: You have a question about BetterFleet? Here we answer the most frequently asked questions
faq.more: You are facing complications or you cannot find an answer to your problem? Meet us here on our

alliance.content1: BetterFleet helps players optimise their alliance creation, but it does not guarantee instant access to a single server.
alliance.content2: The search process entails numerous factors over which BetterFleet has no control. Among which: time of the day, number of players, location, Internet connection, as well as the goodwill of Sea of Thieves matchmaking servers.
alliance.content3: As for how long is needed, we observe a tendency varying between 5 minutes for the luckiest and up to 3 hours for the least fortunate. However, these estimations remain approximate and are not guaranteed.
alliance.content4: Nevertheless, if you are knowledgeable on how to improve the search system for BetterFleet, we are inclined to study any suggestion you can make on Discord or GitHub.
alliance.title: Does BetterFleet guarantee to join the same server instantly?

bug.content1: If you encounter any issue or bugs, we encourage you to bring it to our attention so that we can work on improving your experience. Here is how you can contact us:
bug.content2: Discord: Join our Discord server and share your issue in the dedicated support channel. Our team is always ready to help you and answer your questions in real time.
bug.content3: GitHub: If you are familiar with GitHub, you can also open an issue on our GitHub repository. This allows us to structurally track problems and ensure transparent and effective monitoring.
bug.content4: We appreciate your feedback and are committed to resolving reported issues as quickly as possible.
bug.title: How do I report a problem or a bug?

console.content1: Absolutely! We developed specific features to improve the experience of Xbox and PlayStation players. Here is what we implemented:
console.content2: Audio countdown: We incorporated a sound component to the countdown. This function allows users to know exactly when to set sail, without putting upon the alliance leader to give vocal instructions. This makes sessions run smoothly all the while getting around latency caused by online exchange platforms.
console.content3: Visual indication of the platform used: We added an icon to let users know whether their teammates are on a console. This feature promotes better coordination and understanding between players who use different platforms.
console.content4: These enhancements are designed to make gaming experience more intuitive and accessible for console players, ensuring harmonious integration within mixed gaming communities.
console.title: Is it worthy of interest for console players?

data.content1: The confidentiality and security of our users' data are of the utmost importance to us. Here is our policy regarding the management of user data:
data.content2: Data usage: The username and email address are the only required elements for the proper functioning of the application. No other personal data is collected.
data.content3: Security and encryption: The collected data is encrypted and safely stored to prevent any unauthorised access.
data.content4: Cookies and resale: We do not use cookies, and we do not sell nor do we share users' information with third parties.
data.content5: Anonymous data and statistics: For the continuous improvement of our application, we use anonymous data for statistical purposes. Under no circumstances do these data allow users to be personally identified.
data.content6: We are committed to maintaining a certain level of transparency and respecting the privacy of our users at all times.
data.title: What do we do with user data?

download.content3: Follow the onscreen instructions to complete the installation.
download.content4: That's it! After these steps, BetterFleet will be installed on your device.
download.title: How do I install BetterFleet?

eac.content1: BetterFleet ressembles more a logbook than anything else. Its main automatic feature simulates a fairly simple mouse click, just like a voice command would, and does not technically constitute a macro in itself. Systems like Easy Anti-Cheat (EAC) mostly focus on RAM manipulation and therefore have no reason to condemn our method.
eac.content2: Besides, the click is never executed in game and only occurs in the menu, in accordance with the Sea of Thieves and Xbox terms of service (TOS). These terms are broad enough to juridically cover as many situations as possible, but no point mentions our specific use. The option can however be disabled at user's discretion.
eac.content3: It is still essential to understand that using tools such as BetterFleet and Fleet Creator is not entirely devoid of risks, especially regarding IP detection which remains a sensitive point. Our application is as safe as another, but being neither recognised by Rare nor by Microsoft, we fully depend on their sole decision to take action.
eac.title: Is there any risk with Easy Anti-Cheat? (EAC)

edge.content1: If you have problems running the application or if it crashes after properly installing it, please follow these troubleshooting steps:
edge.content2: Make sure your operating system is Windows 10 or Windows 11.
edge.content3: Check whether Microsoft Edge and Microsoft Edge WebView2 are correctly installed on your device. These components are essential for the proper functioning of the application.
edge.content4: A conflict might occur with your antivirus software. If this one allows it, exclude BetterFleet from the list of present threats. Otherwise, deactivate your software and rerun the application.
edge.content5: If the issue still persists despite these checks, try reinstalling the application in order to fix any potential corruption.
edge.content6: If after these steps the application is still not working, do not hesitate and meet us on our Discord server for more customised assistance.
edge.title: Why does my application crash and/or does not start ?

password.content1: Unfortunately, BetterFleet cannot recover your lost password. If it happens, you can contact us on our Discord and we will reset it for you. However, we recommend that you create a new account, unless you really want to recover the old one.
password.content2: The application has a "Forgot password" feature, but we do not yet have the necessary infrastructure to enable it. You can contribute to the project via our GitHub page to help us set it up.
password.title: What should I do if I forgot my password?

security.content1: Yes, our application was designed with user security as the absolute priority. Following are the measures we implemented to ensure safe use:
security.content2: Reinforced authentication: We incorporated an authentication overlay in order to strengthen the security of user accounts.
security.content3: Open source: The application is completely open source, offering total transparency concerning its use and operation. This allows the community to verify and audit our code, therefore strengthening confidence in our product.
security.content4: Proactive maintenance: Our developers are committed to maintaining the application in optimal security conditions. This includes regular dependencies updates and continuously monitoring potential security breaches to prevent any risk.
security.content5: Independent approach: As BetterFleet is not licenced by Microsoft, it is subjected to Windows Defender upon installation. Our application is no less secure and we set our sights on adapting to these constraints we cannot quite control.
security.content6: These joint efforts contribute to a reliable and secure platform for every one of our users.
security.title: Is the application secure?

update.content1: Whenever an update is available, a pop-up window appears upon launching BetterFleet. You only have to click "Yes" to initiate the update. The application will automatically install the latest version and reboot once the update is complete.
update.content2: Should an update be available while BetterFleet is already running, you can simply close the application. You will be offered to do the update at the next launch.
update.title: How do I update BetterFleet?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

footer.content: A free, open-source tool made by the Sea of Thieves community to help crews sail together. Built and improved by players.
footer.discord: Need help? Get in touch with the team on our
footer.github: Are you a developer who sails the Sea of Thieves? Come and lend a hand on the project!

warning.content: BetterFleet is a non-official third party application unrelated to the Sea of Thieves development team. Its use is purely external and has no impact on gameplay experience. The user agrees to be held sole responsible for its use!
warning.title: Disclaimer

header.details: BetterFleet is out now — give it a try!

presentation.content: Getting your whole crew onto the same Sea of Thieves server is often a hassle. BetterFleet takes care of it: the app syncs everyone's "Set sail" click and shows you who ended up together — so an alliance comes together in minutes rather than hours. Free, open source, and made by players.
presentation.title: BetterFleet

end.content: Godspeed! May you sail amongst honest seamen and make a fortune at sea! Still... Beware of mutineers, they crave the sweet flagrance of newfound richness!
end.title: Once you found the server?

howTo.content: In order to create an alliance in Sea of Thieves, players must coordinate their actions with precision. Organisation generally starts long before putting out to sea, at a time all participants agreed upon. The key is to synchronise the exact moment everyone clicks "Set sail" in the game menu, which potentially allows the different crews to find themselves on the same server. This is where BetterFleet comes into play. So as to help this synchronisation along, the application offers an interface on which players can plan their actions in a coordinatied fashion.
howTo.title: How to create an alliance?

1.content: First and foremost, you need an account. Upon opening BetterFleet you will be asked to log in with your details so you can access the application.
1.title: Log into the Application

2.content: Select 'Create a session' to set up a new space where you will be able to invite other players to join your alliance.
2.title: Create a Session

3.content: A unique ID will be generated for your session. Communicate this ID to the people you wish to invite and be part of the alliance.
3.title: Share the Session ID

4.content: Ask all players to go to the 'Set sail' menu of the game, where they will be able to prepare to start the game together.
4.title: Meeting in the 'Set Sail' Menu

5.content: Every player must then change their status for the start, which they can do by selecting 'Ready' in the application interface.
5.title: Confirm Everyone is Ready

6.content: Once all players are ready, the session host initiates a countdown on BetterFleet so that everyone clicks 'Set sail' simultaneously.
6.title: Initiating Countdown

7.content: Once in game, you'll have to check whether you have found a common server. BetterFleet will group players who ended up together in the list. On the off chance you did not find a server, repeat the process from step 4 and so on.
7.title: Presence Check on a Common Server

whatIsIt.content: An alliance server is a game server where several crews agreed on forming a strategic alliance and cooperating for their mutual benefit. On these servers, players share the same objectives, such as collecting treasures or bringing quests to completion, and shake hands on not attacking each other. The idea is that each and every member benefits from the rewards, therefore optimising profit and gaming experience for everyone. This creates an envrionment where players can focus on teamwork and exploration rather than being competitive, offering a more laid-back community-based adventure.
whatIsIt.title: What is an alliance server on Sea of Thieves?

home.title: BetterFleet — get your Sea of Thieves crew on the same server
home.description: Free, open-source app that syncs your crew’s Set sail so you all land on the same Sea of Thieves server. Shared countdown, live server check, no more sailing solo by accident.

tutorial.title: How to get your crew on the same server — BetterFleet
tutorial.description: Step by step: install BetterFleet, create an alliance, share the code and use the shared countdown so your whole Sea of Thieves crew lands on one server.

support.title: Help and FAQ — BetterFleet
support.description: Answers about installing and updating BetterFleet, whether it is safe to use with Sea of Thieves, what happens to your data, and how to report a problem.

reports.title: Reports — BetterFleet
reports.description: Bug reports sent from the BetterFleet app.
